arts.sum: Blues out end European year on a high

arts.ttl: Arsenal look to complete Chelsea transfer trick as Chilwell closes in on exit
arts.sum: Perhaps he will be thinking about the upcoming January transfer window and should that be the case, football.london has taken a closer look at a couple of the big moves surrounding the Blues in the build-up to next month. According to TeamTalk, an exit in January is on the cards for Ben Chilwell as he looks to regalvanise his career away from Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on Chelsea squad reaction to Mudryk drug test and Acheampong contract
arts.sum: It's not happened with us but it's going to happen again for this different player but I think they know exactly what they have to do and this is the reason why we trust and support Misha. "General support in terms of first of all we trust Misha and second when these kind of things happen you need to support your player in all the aspects."

arts.ttl: Chelsea confirm two new squad members ahead of Conference League tie
arts.sum: Meanwhile, George, 18 has been a regular figure in Chelsea's Conference League team this season, having made six appearances in that competition. And now, it has been revealed that both Acheampong and George have been given spots in the first-team dressing room after impressing in the senior side so far this season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Shamrock Rovers: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea host Shamrock Rovers in Europe on Thursday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, predicted lineups and more.
Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca says the club "believe" Mykhailo Mudryk did not knowingly take a banned substance.

arts.ttl: Chelsea name HUGE asking price for Chukwuemeka
arts.sum: Chelsea are open to letting Carney Chukwuemeka go in January, but signing him will require a hefty outlay, according to a report. Jacobs states that AC Milan are a club to keep an eye on for the winter, echoing reports from Italy, although not going so far as to suggest that the player has already agreed a move to the Rossoneri.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss expects Acheampong and George to feature
